description: Ganti ini — agent baru warga Flowork. Ikuti AGENT_STANDARD.md (DNA wajib: DB-config, ProvisionAgentDNA, genome pipe, cognitive graph lokal, autonomy loop/sleep/wake/anti-ghosting).
author: Aola Sahidin (Mr.Dev)
_comment_caps: capabilities_required = SUMBER KEBENARAN kapabilitas (bukan config.tools). Tambah/kurangi sesuai kebutuhan agent — tiap net:fetch HARUS endpoint spesifik (least-privilege, isolasi). CATATAN: 'rpc:agent-invoke' SENGAJA TIDAK di sini — agent daun (worker/synth) ga manggil agent lain; cuma group-coordinator (group-template) yg butuh. Nambah cap bahaya = guardian alert.
